Center: IAEA Nuclear Data Section, Vienna, Austria
title: Proton and alpha-particle activation studies of natFe, natCu, natTi and natW targets at low energies

x4freetext: Proton and alpha-particle activation studies of natFe,
natCu, natTi and natW targets at low energies
Islamia College, Peshawar; Allama Iqbal Open
Corresponding primarily to the foil thickness,
but also taking into account additional factors
including foil homogeneity and beam dispersion
